name: Powershell Process Observed on a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when a Powershell process has been detected on a compromised host.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when an event matches any of the following BB: Detected a Powershell Process
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
TD_list: APPLY Powershell Process Observed on a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when an event matches any of the following BB: Detected a Powershell Process
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
RED_list: Event name: Powershell Has Been Launched in a Compromised Host
Event description: Powershell Has Been Launched in a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
